plays.playDescription:
(:50) (Shotgun) D.Brees pass short left to M.Colston to CLE 22 for 4 yards (E.Wright). FUMBLES (E.Wright), and recovers at CLE 23. M.Colston to CLE 23 for no gain (E.Wright). After the play, the Saints attempted to rush a field goal attempt, as Cleveland through the CHALLENGE flag, asserting that Colston FUMBLED and the ball was recovered by Cleveland.  This challenge was DENIED, as the play was not reviewable. After the third quarter ended, the Saints then challenged the ruling that Colston was down by contact.
New Orleans challenged the fumble ruling, and the play was REVERSED.
(Shotgun) D.Brees pass short left to M.Colston to CLE 21 for 5 yards (E.Wright). The overturn on review negated the fumble.
